dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: SpaceX IPO Targets $2T+ Valuation — Bloomberg Analyzes Widening Competitive Moat
heroSubtitle: 8,755 days of reusability milestones — Bloomberg Apr 24 analysis: SpaceX's moat deepened by Starlink ($15.9–24B 2026 revenue), Golden Dome defense software consortium (Apr 22), $178.5M SDA missile-tracking order, and $60B Cursor AI option (Apr 23); IPO targeting June 2026 Nasdaq debut above $2T, $75B raise; 50 orbital launches in 2026; 600th booster landing Apr 19; Starship IFT-12 targeting May 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Inside GNSS, Northrop Grumman, Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, Quilty Space
